n8n.title: Agent700 Agent
n8n.description:
Agent700 is an AI agent platform that lets you run trusted agents with alignment data and context. This community package adds two custom n8n nodes so you can call those agents and manage their context directly from your workflows—with App Password auth, no manual token handling, and support for batch processing, error handling, and encrypted key/value storage.
What you get
Agent700 Agent – Send messages to any Agent700 agent from a workflow. You specify the agent (by ID), the message (with full n8n expression support), and optional simplified output. The node uses your App Password to authenticate and wraps the message in the API format. Use it for one-off Q&A, content analysis, URL or document evaluation, and as a building block in multi-step or batch workflows.
Agent700 Context Library – Manage key/value “alignment” data that agents can use as context. Data is stored with encryption at rest. The node supports full CRUD: create, update, upsert, delete, get one entry, and list all entries. It also supports pattern-based query (e.g. glob-style keys) and Query + Construct to build JSON from matching entries via a template—so you can feed dynamic, structured context into your Agent node or other nodes.
Authentication and security
All nodes use Agent700 App Password API credentials (no copy-paste of short-lived tokens).
You set a Base URL (default https://api.agent700.ai) and your App Password (e.g. app_a7_ + 32 characters) in the credential; the nodes obtain and use access tokens for you.
App passwords can be scoped and revoked in the Agent700 UI, and you can use n8n’s credential storage and different passwords per environment (e.g. dev/staging/prod).
Typical use cases
Chat and Q&A – Manual or trigger-based workflows that send a question to an agent and use the reply (e.g. in a notification or another node).
Content and URL evaluation – Fetch URLs or content, loop over them, send each to the Agent node for analysis (e.g. privacy or compliance), then store or aggregate results with the Context Library.
Context-driven conversations – Use the Context Library to store user preferences, session data, or domain context; then send that context (or template-built JSON) in the message to the Agent node for personalized or context-aware answers.
Batch and pipelines – Combine with “Split In Batches,” error handling, and “Continue on Fail” for robust bulk processing and fallbacks.
Technical details
Nodes: Agent700 Agent, Agent700 Context Library.
Credentials: Agent700 App Password API (Base URL + App Password).
Compatibility: Built for current n8n Node API; Node.js 18+.
Install: npm install @a700/n8n-nodes-agent700 then restart n8n; nodes appear under Agent700 Agent and Agent700 Context Library.
Usable as tool: Both nodes are marked usableAsTool: true for agentic/sub-workflow use where supported.
Docs and support
README and workflow examples (simple chat, context injection, URL evaluation, batch processing, error handling) are in the repo.
For API and product details: https://agent700.readme.io/
Package: @a700/n8n-nodes-agent700 on npm.

n8n.title: AlphaInsider
n8n.description:
AlphaInsider n8n Integration:

Unlock real-time trading automation with the AlphaInsider node for n8n. This community node connects your n8n workflows directly to AlphaInsider’s API — with the core functionality being a powerful WebSocket Trigger node.

The WebSocket Trigger instantly live-streams data from AlphaInsider into n8n, delivering continuous updates on:
• Live trading strategy signals & performance
• Real-time stock & crypto market data
• Bot broker connection status, activities, and allocations

AlphaInsider is an open marketplace for crypto and stock trading strategies. It provides transparent, real-time performance tracking of top strategies from proven traders and quants. Users follow strategies, compare results, and automate trades by securely linking their own broker or exchange accounts via API — all while keeping full control of their funds (non-custodial).

With this integration, build lightning-fast workflows that react instantly to market moves, strategy updates, or connection changes. Trigger alerts, rebalance portfolios, log data to databases, or execute trades across Slack, email, spreadsheets, and more — no custom code required.

Perfect for quant traders, algo enthusiasts, and anyone scaling live automated trading.

n8n.title: DeepTagger
n8n.description:
DeepTagger Node works like "Structured Output Parser" + "OCR" node together. Importantly it allows you to interactively define extraction logic (schema and examples) visually with "select and highlight" interface at https://deeptagger.com/.
Convert any type of file into arbitrary-complex JSON via examples.
In case extraction doesn't work as you need then provide additional examples to improve accuracy.

Have a look at our example here:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=10KoWJl9RHg

It provides a streamlined way to audit your software supply chain, resolve package advisories, and retrieve detailed CVE records to identify and mitigate organizational risk.

n8n.title: Minotaur API
n8n.description:
Minotaur Sales is a B2B sales intelligence and CRM platform built for outbound teams across the Americas. We are developing a comprehensive sales hub that goes beyond traditional contact databases — combining verified prospect data, CRM workflows, email verification, lead scoring, and pipeline management in a single platform, designed to replace the fragmented stacks that most B2B sales teams operate today.
Our contact database currently covers 130M+ verified contacts across the United States, Colombia, Mexico, Brazil, and Latin America broadly — a region where the dominant tools like Apollo.io and ZoomInfo have historically underperformed in both coverage and accuracy. That gap is our foundation.
We are actively building and expanding the platform's integration ecosystem. Today, Minotaur Sales connects natively with HubSpot, Outlook, and Google Workspace, and exposes a public API. We are developing a native n8n node to allow users to plug Minotaur's contact data, verification engine, list management, and lead scoring directly into their automation workflows — removing the need for custom API calls and making Minotaur a first-class citizen in any modern sales automation stack.
Looking ahead, our roadmap is focused on making Minotaur Sales the leading sales data and intelligence platform for the Americas — a regional alternative to ZoomInfo and Apollo built from the ground up for how B2B teams in the US, Colombia, Mexico, Brazil, and the broader Latin American market actually operate. That means deeper data coverage, richer company and contact profiles, and a platform that is genuinely useful as both a prospecting database and a full CRM — not a tool that requires five integrations to deliver value.
The integration layer is central to this vision. Beyond n8n, we are building toward a broad ecosystem of native connectors — CRM platforms, email sequencing tools, marketing automation, communication channels, and data enrichment providers — so that Minotaur Sales can operate as the data backbone of any sales team's stack, regardless of what tools they already use.

Prey for n8n helps IT and security teams automate device fleet operations at scale across Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iOS.

With this node, you can connect Prey to your operational workflows to monitor devices, detect risks, and trigger actions automatically—without manual follow-up.

Use it to:
  - Track device status and location in real time
  - Automate geofence and movement-based workflows
  - Trigger incident-response actions for lost or at-risk devices
  - Enrich alerts with fleet context for faster decisions
  - Feed dashboards and reports for IT managers and security teams

Prey + n8n gives your team a practical way to reduce response time, standardize operations, and improve fleet visibility from a single automation layer.

The Wavix node enables seamless integration with the Wavix CPaaS (Communications Platform as a Service), allowing you to automate messaging, phone validation, and two-factor authentication workflows directly within n8n.

Wavix provides global telecom infrastructure for SMS/MMS delivery, phone number intelligence, and secure verification flows. This node exposes the most commonly used API endpoints and transforms them into easy-to-use workflow actions.

With this node, you can send transactional messages, validate phone numbers before outreach, and build secure authentication flows—all without writing custom code.

n8n.title: Weavely Trigger
n8n.description: Trigger n8n workflows with Weavely, the AI-powered form builder. Create beautiful, customizable forms and automate responses instantly. This node fires when submissions arrive, delivering clean data with human-readable field labels for seamless workflow integration.

n8n.title: WebScraper.IO
n8n.description: WebScraper.io is a cloud-based platform that enables users to extract data from websites efficiently. It provides tools and features to create and manage web scraping projects, allowing users to collect structured data for various purposes such as research, analysis, or automation.

n8n.title: Webex by Cisco
n8n.description: WebEx is a multi-functional desktop video/audio conference call application. It enables high-definition video meetings for up to 1,000 participants. Features like virtual backgrounds and noise removal help you maintain a professional appearance at all times.

n8n.title: Webex by Cisco Trigger
n8n.description: WebEx is a multi-functional desktop video/audio conference call application. It enables high-definition video meetings for up to 1,000 participants. Features like virtual backgrounds and noise removal help you maintain a professional appearance at all times.

n8n.title: Webflow
n8n.description: Webflow is a powerful visual content management system that appeals to web designers who want to create and customize websites and have hosting, security, and website performance taken care of. It aims to bring the power of website animations and interactions directly into a visual toolbox.

n8n.title: Webflow Trigger
n8n.description: Webflow is a powerful visual content management system that appeals to web designers who want to create and customize websites and have hosting, security, and website performance taken care of. It aims to bring the power of website animations and interactions directly into a visual toolbox.

n8n.title: Webhook
n8n.description: Webhooks are automatic notifications that apps send when something occurs. They are sent to a certain URL, which is effectively the app's phone number or address, and contain a message or payload. Polling is nearly never quicker than webhooks, and it takes less effort from you.

n8n.title: WebinarJam
n8n.description: WebinarJam is a cloud-based webinar platform that allows users to host live webinars, create automated webinars, and engage with participants through interactive features. It provides a comprehensive toolkit for online presentations, marketing, and training, making it an efficient solution for businesses and professionals.

n8n.title: Webmetic
n8n.description: Webmetic is a solution that converts anonymous website traffic into qualified leads—without cookies and 100% GDPR compliant.Using AI-powered algorithms, Webmetic identifies which companies are visiting your website, provides comprehensive company data, and enables automation.

n8n.title: Wekan
n8n.description: WeKan is an open source, free software collaborative kanban board with an MIT license. It is an unmatched tool for keeping things organized. They give you a visual representation of where your project is at the moment.

n8n.title: Whal3s
n8n.description: Develop web3 interfaces specifically for your token owners, seamlessly integrated into either your existing platform or a third-party application, to enhance their digital experiences and interactions within the blockchain ecosystem.

n8n.title: WhatConverts
n8n.description: WhatConverts is a powerful tracking and lead generation software that helps businesses track and analyze their marketing efforts. It provides real-time insights, call tracking, form tracking, and reports, helping companies optimize their marketing campaigns and maximize their ROI.

n8n.title: WhatsApp Business Cloud
n8n.description: The cloud-based version of WhatsApp Business API, WhatsApp Cloud API enables companies and developers to build applications on top of WhatsApp to personalize user experiences and quickly and easily respond to customers.

n8n.title: WhatsApp Notifications by SyncMate
n8n.description: Connect SyncMate to over 5,000+ apps and services through our N8N integration. Automate WhatsApp messaging based on triggers from virtually any business tool you use, creating seamless communication workflows without writing a single line of code.

n8n.title: Wise
n8n.description: Wise is a great choice for international money transfers. It offers ease-of-use, transparency, low fees, and great customer service. n8n.title: WizyChat
n8n.description: WizyChat allows users to create a chatbot using their own knowledge base, sourced from any platform, and integrate it with various apps. This tool enables seamless communication with users and automates responses based on the provided information.

n8n.title: Wonderchat
n8n.description: Wonderchat is a messaging app that allows users to connect with friends and family through instant messaging, voice calls, and video calls. It also features fun filters and stickers for added entertainment. Additionally, users can create group chats and share photos and videos.

n8n.title: Zoho CRM

n8n.title: Zoho Desk
n8n.description: Zoho Desk is a cloud-based help desk software that enables businesses to effectively manage customer support tickets. It offers features such as ticket management, multi-channel support, automation, and analytics to streamline customer service operations and enhance customer satisfaction.

n8n.title: Zoho WorkDrive

n8n.title: Zonka Feedback
n8n.description: Zonka-feedback is a customer feedback and survey platform that helps businesses collect, analyze, and act on feedback to improve customer experience and drive growth. n8n.title: Zoom

n8n.title: easybits Extractor

n8n.title: ecwid
n8n.description: Ecwid is an e-commerce platform that allows businesses to easily sell products online. It provides a range of features for creating and managing online stores, including customizable storefronts, payment integration, inventory management, and order tracking.

n8n.title: elmah.io
n8n.description: elmah.io provides cloud-based logging for .NET web applications. It offers robust search capabilities, customizable rules, seamless integration with issue trackers, and an API for additional functionality. Ideal for monitoring and managing application errors efficiently.

n8n.title: fal.ai

n8n.title: geoCapture
n8n.description: "geoCapture digitalisiert die komplette Einsatzsteuerung: GPS-Ortung, Zeiterfassung, Tourenplanung und Fuhrparkmanagement in einer zentralen Plattform. n8n.title: gotoHuman
n8n.description: gotoHuman is a human-in-the-loop platform for AI agents and agentic workflows. Teams can review and edit AI-generated content, approve actions and tool calls, or provide input - effectively serving as the interface for your n8n AI workflows with built-in authentication, notifications and logs.

n8n.title: handelsregister.ai
n8n.description: Automate access to German Handelsregister data for lead scoring, financial analysis, insolvency monitoring, KYC/KYB, lead generation, and retrieving documents for compliance and legal work.

n8n.title: iAuditor by SafetyCulture
n8n.description: iAuditor by SafetyCulture is a digital inspection app that allows businesses to conduct audits and inspections efficiently. It enables users to easily create checklists, collect data, and generate reports, improving safety and compliance procedures for organizations across various industries.

n8n.title: iTop

n8n.title: imgbb
n8n.description: imgbb is an image hosting and sharing platform that allows users to upload, store, and share their images for free. It provides an easy-to-use interface, unlimited storage, and multiple sharing options, making it convenient for individuals and businesses alike.

n8n.title: invoice-api.xhub
n8n.description: Create, validate, and convert e-invoices directly in your n8n workflows. The xhub Invoice API node supports XRechnung, ZUGFeRD, and Peppol — fully compliant with Germany's mandatory B2B e-invoicing requirements. Automate your invoice processing with just a few clicks.

n8n.title: ncScale
n8n.description: ncScale is an app that monitors your no-code stack, simplifying troubleshooting, enhancing security, and aiding in consolidating documentation and best practices.

n8n.title: nele.ai

n8n.title: thanks.io
n8n.description: Automate your direct mail with n8n‑nodes‑thanks‑io! Send postcards, letters, notecards, and giftcards through thanks.io directly from n8n workflows. Perfect for follow-ups, marketing, and personalized campaigns — all triggered automatically, no code required.

n8n.title: uProc
n8n.description: uProc offer businesses data optimization solutions to boost sales, marketing and development. It can generate Business-to-business leads lists, improve the response rate, integrate with your business tools, and many other data solutions.
